summary: Iteration 2: All 6 corrections tested and verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All corrections working correctly. Activities no longer hardcoded - app starts empty, admin panel has full CRUD form with 13 fields. Map screen corrections (search bar, navbar, bottom sheet) all functional. Feed shows proper empty state. Auth still working with admin credentials.

correction_1.description: Map screen - search bar and profile button separated into independent elements
correction_1.details: Search bar is full-width separate element (256px width), profile button is absolute positioned independently in top right corner with proper gap between elements

correction_2.description: Map screen - navbar moved up with safe area padding, XP bar inside
correction_2.details: Navbar visible at bottom with 'Activite' and 'Explorer' buttons. XP bar with level and XP count visible inside navbar above bottom edge

correction_3.description: Map screen - configurator is Animated bottom sheet overlay (not Modal)
correction_3.details: Clicking center play button opens 'Personnalisation' as animated bottom sheet. Map screen remains in DOM (overlay, not navigation). All 3 tabs visible (MEMBRES, MOOD, PRATIQUE). Clicking overlay closes the sheet correctly

correction_4.description: Feed screen - cards stack correctly, empty state shown when no activities
correction_4.details: Feed shows proper empty state message 'Aucune activite disponible pour le moment' with 'Retour a la carte' button when no activities exist. Card stacking works when activities are present (1/1 counter visible)

correction_5.description: Feed screen - reserve button is large (height 48px), positioned at bottom left
correction_5.details: Reserve button ('Reserver') visible at bottom of feed screen with calendar icon, positioned at bottom left with proper zIndex. Full-width yellow button with navy text

correction_6.description: App starts empty - no hardcoded activities, admin panel has full CRUD form
correction_6.details: Backend no longer seeds hardcoded activities (confirmed in server.py line 600). GET /api/activities returns current DB state (empty or with admin-created activities). Admin panel shows empty state 'Aucune activite pour le moment' with 'Ajouter une activite' button. Full CRUD form includes ALL 13 fields: Name, Description, Address, Arrondissement, Category (8 options), Price/pers, Duration, Schedule, Rating, XP, Tags, Image URL, GPS coordinates (lat/lng)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ CORRECTION 1: Search bar (lines 130-133 map.tsx) and profile button (lines 136-138) are properly separated with independent positioning
✅ CORRECTION 2: Navbar (lines 187-210 map.tsx) has safe area padding and XP bar inside (lines 203-209)
✅ CORRECTION 3: Bottom sheet uses Animated.View (lines 213-320 map.tsx), not Modal. Overlay click closes sheet
✅ CORRECTION 4: Feed (lines 104-114 feed.tsx) shows empty state when activities.length === 0
✅ CORRECTION 5: Reserve button (lines 209-217 feed.tsx) has height: 48, position: absolute, bottom: 32, zIndex: 30
✅ CORRECTION 6: Backend server.py line 600 confirms 'Activities are managed via Admin Panel - no seeding'. Admin form (admin.tsx lines 115-196) has all required fields
✅ Backend tests updated to expect empty activities initially and test admin CRUD endpoints
✅ All 14 backend tests passing (8 auth + 6 activities/admin)
✅ Auth still working with admin credentials from test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. App starts empty as per CORRECTION 6. Admin can create activities via POST /api/admin/activities
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 corrections successfully implemented and tested. Activities are no longer hardcoded - the app starts with an empty database and relies on admin panel CRUD to add activities. Map screen has separate search bar and profile button, navbar with XP bar, and configurator as animated bottom sheet overlay. Feed handles empty state correctly. Admin panel has comprehensive 13-field CRUD form for creating activities with all required data (name, description, address, category, price, duration, schedule, GPS, image, rating, XP, tags).

backend_endpoints_tested.activities_empty: ✅ GET /api/activities returns empty array or admin-created activities
backend_endpoints_tested.admin_create_activity: ✅ POST /api/admin/activities creates activity with full form data
backend_endpoints_tested.admin_auth_required: ✅ Non-admin users get 401 when trying to create activities
backend_endpoints_tested.auth_endpoints: ✅ All auth endpoints working (register, login, logout, me)

frontend_screens_tested.map: ✅ Search bar separate, profile button separate, navbar with XP, bottom sheet configurator
frontend_screens_tested.feed: ✅ Empty state shown, card stacking works, reserve button positioned correctly
frontend_screens_tested.admin: ✅ Panel accessible at /admin, shows empty state, full CRUD form with 13 fields
